inputs.command: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && echo "=== Build ===" && cd frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "=== API ===" && cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && curl -s 'http://localhost:8000/metadata/enrichment/facets?occupation=rabbi' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); total=sum(c['count'] for c in d['centuries']); print(f'Rabbi centuries total: {total}')" && echo "=== Done ==="
